sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15801" key="a)ru/paros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρύπᾰρος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n15801.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not sordid,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γάμος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.149.8</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
